text: BNS Section 303: Punishment for Murder. Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine. Equivalent to IPC Section 302.
BNS Section 318: Cheating. Whoever, by deceiving any person, fraudulently or dishonestly induces the person so deceived to deliver any property... commits cheating. Equivalent to IPC Section 420.
IPC Section 420: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property. Essential for financial scams and UPI frauds.
IT Act Section 66C: Identity Theft. Punishment for identity theft involving electronic signatures or passwords. Crucial for account takeover cases.
IT Act Section 66D: Punishment for cheating by personation by using computer resource. Typically used in 'fake profile' or 'customer care' scams.
BNS Section 308: Culpable homicide not amounting to murder. Equivalent to IPC Section 304.
IPC Section 376: Punishment for Rape. Severe penalties for sexual assault. Note BNS Section 64 for equivalent modern provision.
BNS Section 111: Organized Crime. Defines and prescribes punishment for continuing unlawful activity by a group with the objective of gaining pecuniary benefit.
IPC Section 120B: Punishment of criminal conspiracy. Used when two or more persons agree to do an illegal act.
IT Act Section 43: Penalty for damage to computer system. Includes unauthorized data extraction or deletion.
